system.descriptor: Tech-Use represents a character's ability to operate, maintain, and repair technological devices, from simple machines to complex cogitators.
system.uses:
Uses: Operating unfamiliar technology, performing repairs, jury-rigging devices, interfacing with cogitators and data systems, disabling technological devices.
Special Use: Repair: Tech-Use tests can repair damaged equipment. The difficulty and time required depend on the complexity and extent of damage. Adequate tools and parts may be required.
Special Use: Demolitions: Can be used to set or disarm explosive charges.

description.value: Tech-Use represents a character's ability to operate, maintain, and repair technological devices, from simple machines to complex cogitators.
